hub_subtitle: Medical English to welcome guests and present with confidence

lesson.menu_title: Saying Who You Are -- Present Simple for Identity
lesson.menu_desc: Describing your role and your team with the present simple -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 2 -- Saying Who You Are: Present Simple for Identity
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Graziele Dias | Aula 2 -- Who You Are

listenings.text: Hi Graziele, this is Dr. Carter. Thank you again for the welcome yesterday. I have a question about your role. You work with many doctors and many departments, so you are the right person. Who is the coordinator for the cardiology team? Please send me the name and the role. I want to talk to your colleague about a new project. Thank you, and talk soon.

Hello, my name is Sofia. I am a coordinator too. I work in the same hospital as Graziele, but I work in a different department. I do not work in cardiology. I work with the surgery team. I manage ten colleagues, and I share an office with two nurses. We have a meeting every Monday. Nice to meet you.

extra_audio.text: Graziele talks about her role at the hospital. She says she is a coordinator. She works with many teams and many departments. She introduces a colleague to Dr. Carter. Dr. Carter asks about the cardiology team. They plan a meeting for a new project.
